nasb.text: Between the upper room of the corner and the Sheep Gate the goldsmiths and the merchants carried out repairs.

esv.text: And between the upper chamber of the corner and the Sheep Gate the goldsmiths and the merchants repaired.

cnv.text: 金匠和商人修築城的角樓和羊門之間的那一段。

ccb.text: 金匠和商人修筑从城的角楼到羊门的那一段。
